name: Ubiquiti 2.5G PoE+ Adapter (30W)
title: Ubiquiti 2.5G PoE+ Adapter (30W)
title_extended: Ubiquiti 2.5G PoE+ Adapter (30W) - High-Speed 2.5G PoE+ Adapter
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-PoE+-2.5G is a versatile Power over Ethernet (PoE+) adapter designed to deliver up to 30 watts of power to compatible UniFi devices while supporting data transmission speeds up to 2.5 Gbps. This adapter is ideal for scenarios where deploying a full PoE switch is impractical or cost-prohibitive, offering a reliable alternative for powering devices such as access points and cameras. Its compact dimensions and lightweight design make it suitable for various installation environments. The adapter operates within a wide input voltage range of 100–240V AC at 50/60Hz and provides a stable 48V DC output at 0.65A. With an efficiency rating exceeding 87% and a switching frequency of up to 65 kHz, the UACC-PoE+-2.5G minimizes energy loss and heat generation. Its RJ45 shielded socket supports 2-pair powering on pins 4,5 (+) and 7,8 (−), aligning with standard PoE+ specifications. This adapter is a practical solution for extending PoE capabilities in existing network infrastructures without significant overhauls. The UACC-PoE+-2.5G is engineered with robust safety features to protect both the adapter and connected devices. It includes surge protection mechanisms capable of handling up to 1500A for power lines and 36A for data lines, with clamping protection set at 11V for data and 60V for power. These features safeguard against voltage spikes and electrical surges, which are common in dynamic network environments. The adapter's response time is less than 1 nanosecond, ensuring rapid reaction to electrical anomalies. It operates effectively within an ambient temperature range of 0 to 40°C, with humidity tolerance between 10% and 95% non-condensing. Certified by CE, FCC, IC, UL, UKCA, KC, CCC, and RoHS, the UACC-PoE+-2.5G meets international standards for safety and environmental compliance. Its design includes an LED indicator for status monitoring, providing visual confirmation of operational states, which aids in troubleshooting and maintenance. Overall, the UACC-PoE+-2.5G combines high-speed data support, efficient power delivery, and comprehensive protection features, making it a reliable choice for enhancing network setups.
